meta.notes: Validates WHITEGOODS_ANALYTICS.MARTS.MART_RECEIVING_ACTIVITY — daily receiving aggregates for RECEIVED POs only.
Table must have at least one receiving record.
Every receiving record must have a received date (filter ensures actual_delivery_date is not null).
Every receiving record must have a location.
Units received must be at least 1 — zero-unit rows indicate a data loading issue.
Receiving value must be zero or positive.
Each row must aggregate at least one PO.
